scenes.narration: What if your entire life was just a simulation?
scenes.subtitle: What if your life was a simulation?
scenes.image_prompt: digital matrix code raining down, green neon cyberpunk theme, dramatic lighting, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: In The Matrix, humans live inside a computer program created by machines.
scenes.subtitle: Humans trapped inside a computer program.
scenes.image_prompt: futuristic pods with humans connected by cables, dystopian sci-fi, cinematic

scenes.narration: Neo, a hacker, senses something is wrong with reality.
scenes.subtitle: Neo senses reality is broken.
scenes.image_prompt: young man at computer, green monitor glow, glitch effects

scenes.narration: He meets Morpheus, who offers him a choice.
scenes.subtitle: A choice that changes everything.
scenes.image_prompt: Morpheus holding red pill and blue pill, cyberpunk sunglasses reflection

scenes.narration: Take the blue pill and stay asleep… or take the red pill and learn the truth.
scenes.subtitle: Red pill = truth. Blue pill = illusion.
scenes.image_prompt: red pill floating in dark void, neon glow

scenes.narration: Neo chooses the truth—and wakes up in a ruined future controlled by machines.
scenes.subtitle: The real world is destroyed.
scenes.image_prompt: post-apocalyptic landscape, giant machines harvesting humans, dark realism
